CVE-2024-3596.title: RADIUS Protocol under RFC 2865 is susceptible to forgery attacks  ...
CVE-2024-3596.summary: RADIUS Protocol under RFC 2865 is susceptible to forgery attacks by a local attacker who can modify any valid Response (Access-Accept, Access-Reject, or Access-Challenge) to any other response using a chosen-prefix collision attack against MD5 Response Authenticator signature.
